reasoning_top2: The baseline finding that people hold anti-profit beliefs (responses > 0) is a descriptive phenomenon that aligns with general attitudes toward corporations and is well-powered with N~100 per cell.

While the specific moderation effect (strong reputational constraints eliminating the effect) might be somewhat sensitive to experimental context, the primary effect sizes are robust (d = 0.43 to 0.58) and p-values are very small.
